name: io.github.mana-am/claude-f-me
description: Control intimate hardware (Buttplug/Intiface) by chatting — reactive web console, built-in simulator, master remote, video/game/audio modes, safety caps.

environmentVariables.name: CFM_MODE
environmentVariables.description: Backend: 'simulated' (no hardware) or 'buttplug' (real device via Intiface Central).

environmentVariables.name: CFM_CONSOLE_PORT
environmentVariables.description: Port for the live web console.

environmentVariables.name: CFM_MAX_INTENSITY
environmentVariables.description: Hard safety cap on output intensity, between 0 and 1.

environmentVariables.name: CFM_INTIFACE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Intiface Central WebSocket URL (only used when CFM_MODE=buttplug).
